name: Can Connect
description: Returns `CRITICAL` if the Agent is unable to connect to the monitored IBM Db2 database, or `OK` otherwise.

name: Database status
description: Returns `CRITICAL` if the monitored IBM Db2 database is quiesced, `WARNING` for quiesce-pending or rollforwards, or `OK` otherwise.

name: HADR status
description: Returns `CRITICAL` for disconnected HADR state, `WARNING` for catchup or congested state, `OK` for peer and connected state, or `UNKNOWN` otherwise.
